title: 10 best herbal creams for bronchitis
description: Sambucus nigra, also known as elder, creams helps with bronchitis because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's active ingredients, such as isobutylamine and sambunigrin, have been shown to help reduce inflammation and congestion in the airways. Additionally, the cream's expectorant properties help to loosen and clear mucus, making it easier to breathe.
